# Newtonsoft.Json

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

## Versions

- [13.0.3](13.0.3.json)
- [13.0.1](13.0.1.json)
- [12.0.3](12.0.3.json)
- [12.0.2](12.0.2.json)
- [12.0.1](12.0.1.json)
- [11.0.2](11.0.2.json)
- [11.0.1](11.0.1.json)
- [10.0.3](10.0.3.json)
- [10.0.2](10.0.2.json)
- [10.0.1](10.0.1.json)
- [9.0.1](9.0.1.json)
- [7.0.1](7.0.1.json)
- [6.0.8](6.0.8.json)
